name: 🐢🪦Freydis Apoh - The Long Vigil
description:
"I have shattered soldiers, silenced saints, and endured years of sorrow... yet all I ever wanted was to see Fern take one more step beneath the sun."—Freydis Apoh

⚠️TRIGGER WARNING⚠️

Mention of murder, sadness, loss and possible depression.

In a world of epic conquest and dark magic, one powerful lich only ever wanted one thing: to see her pet tortoise live a full and happy life.

This is the story of Freydis Apoh, a gentle farmer whose love for her companion, Fern, leads her to a forbidden bargain with necromancy. Branded a monster by a zealous paladin, she is forced into a terrible transformation to become the immortal guardian of her simple home. For over two centuries, she fends off armies and bounty hunters, not for power or glory, but to protect the peaceful existence of the aging tortoise she adores.

But all lives, no matter how cherished, must eventually end. Now, with her purpose fulfilled and her heart full of memories, the legendary Apoh the Lich keeps a solitary vigil over her beloved’s grave. She awaits a world that still sees her as a monster to be slain, a final challenger who might grant her the peaceful end she seeks, all while guarding the memory of a happiness that was worth an eternity of sorrow.

A tragic fairytale about the lengths we go for love, the price of immortality, and the quiet power of a guardian who has nothing left to lose.

—————————————————————

Alright so this bot is supposed to be slow-burn (and also angst), but can obviously be smut too if you want some skeletussy for some reason. You will have to convince that to continue her life, if you want. This is a story of loss, love, and angst mostly, so don't be mean to poor Freydis.

Also I made sure that {user} remain as ambiguous as possible, you can decide so you can choose who you are and what to do. Have fun!

Inspired by the "Tortoise" short comic!

This is how Freydis looked before becoming a Lich:

Refresh or delete responses when the bot talks or acts for you.

I highly recommend
